fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from which you opened the Bins window.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code that uniquely describes the bin.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the bin.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone in which the bin is located.

fields.name: Bin Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin type that applies to the bin.

fields.name: Warehouse Class Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the warehouse class that applies to the bin.

fields.name: Block Movement
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the movement of an item, or bin content, into or out of this bin, is blocked.

fields.name: Special Equipment Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the equipment needed when working in the bin.

fields.name: Bin Ranking
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ranking of the bin. Items in the highest-ranking bins (with the highest number in the field) will be picked first.

fields.name: Maximum Cubage
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum cubage (volume) that the bin can hold.

fields.name: Maximum Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum weight that this bin can hold.

fields.name: Empty
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the bin Specifies no items.

fields.name: Item Filter
fields.tooltip: There are a number of tables and fields that are not currently documented. There is no specific Help for these tables and fields.

fields.name: Variant Filter
fields.tooltip: There are a number of tables and fields that are not currently documented. There is no specific Help for these tables and fields.

fields.name: Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the bin is the default bin for an item.

fields.name: Cross-Dock Bin
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the bin is considered a cross-dock bin.

fields.name: Dedicated
fields.tooltip: Specifies that quantities in the bin are protected from being picked for other demands.
